ReturnNote.title: Return Note
ReturnNote.description: Represents an expiry product return note containing general details about this batch of returns.

id.description: Unique ID of the return note.

title.description: User-facing title or department name for this return batch.

status.description: Current status of the return note.

creatorId.description: UID of the user who compiled this return note.

creatorEmail.description: Email address of the compiler user.

ReturnNoteItem.title: Return Note Item
ReturnNoteItem.description: A single expired product item included in a return note.

id.description: Unique ID of the product item.

barcode.description: Barcode of the expired product (e.g. UPC, EAN, or manual identifier).

quantity.description: Quantity of the expired product to return.

expiryDate.description: Expiry date of the product (normally YYYY-MM-DD format).

reason.description: Reason for the product return (e.g. past expiry date, close to expiry, damaged, packaging fault).

/returnNotes/{noteId}.description: Collection of all product return notes.

/returnNotes/{noteId}/items/{itemId}.description: Subcollection of items within an individual return note.
